message:
fix(clippy): resolve 7 clippy warnings in CLI binary

- Replace .and() with .and_then() to avoid eager evaluation (next_robot_events_cursor)
- Remove redundant guard in match arm (distributed handshake size == 0)
- Use Duration::from_secs(5) instead of Duration::from_millis(5_000)
- Replace .clone() assignments with .clone_from() for receipts (4 instances)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
